REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 12, 2023. NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 15, 2023 OPPOSING PARTY TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF OPPOSITION WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. (MOVING PAPERS AND REPLY RECEIVED). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED ATTORNEY FEES IN THE ENFORCEMENT OF THE CONTRACT, BUT THE PROVISION IN THE LEASE FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES ARISES IN THE CONTEXT OF INDEMNIFICATION AND NOT LITIGATION, AND THUS ARE NOT COVERED BY CCP 1717. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF REQUESTED ATTORNEY FEES UNDER CCP 1179, BUT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF IS NOT SEEKING RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE AND HAS NOT PLEAD ANY HARDSHIP, ATTORNEY FEES ARE NOT AVAILABLE. ORDER SUBMITTED FOR EXECUTION. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Jessica Le, of Klinedinst PC, Tel. (916) 282-0100, for defendants, appears via Zoom;
No other appearances in the matter.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SAIJUN LUO, Motion To Compel Defendant Dolores Park's Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One is DENIED. The response to Form Interrogatory No. 12.3 is complete because "No" is an answer. The remainder of the answer is hedging that does not undermine the completeness of the "no" answer. Defendant's motion for sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $460 (2 hours at $230). Plaintiff did not respond to the August 5 meet and confer efforts, which could have resolved these issues.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.

DEFENDNATS' NOTICE OF DEMURRER AND DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Anthony Chiosso; Chiosso Law Offices; 415-964-1321; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Saijun Luo.
Abram P. Petersen; Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski LLP; 415-981-0550; appearing as counsel for defendants Dolores Park Terraces Owner LLC, Greentree Property Management, Inc., and Zoey Westrate.

Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDNATS' DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND for Plaintiff to state specific facts, indicating where the mold was (or other conditions P cites, such as vermin, odors, etc.), how Defendants refused to remediate, how Defendants' failure to remediate caused Plaintiff emotional distress, and a description of Plaintiff's emotional distress response.

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Anthony Chiosso; Chiosso Law Offices; 415-964-1321; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Saijun Luo.
Abram P. Petersen; Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski LLP; 415-981-0550; appearing as counsel for defendants Dolores Park Terraces Owner LLC, Greentree Property Management, Inc., and Zoey Westrate.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED. Plaintiff requested attorney fees in the Enforcement of the Contract, but the provision in the Lease for attorney's fees arises in the context of indemnification and not litigation, and thus are not covered by CCP 1717. Further, Plaintiff requested attorney fees under CCP 1179, but because Plaintiff is not seeking relief from forfeiture and has not plead any hardship, attorney fees are not available.

Order submitted for execution. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
